title: Girls In Sports — AI Video Composition & Media Ranking
description: AI-powered video segmentation, audio analysis, and smart composition for youth sports marketing content.

stories.title: Intent-driven video composition with user editing
stories.description: User describes intent, AI generates production script, user edits before execution. Hidden prompts in prompt-engineer.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: User intent textarea opens before composition type selection
AI generates script based on user intent + selected assets
User can edit the generated script before executing
stories.notes: Completed 2026-05-18. Implemented prompt-engineer.ts, updated composer.ts, event page UI, composition API. Commit: f185410.

stories.title: Vision AI error handling with configuration states
stories.description: Distinguish 'not configured' vs 'configured but failed' vs 'spend limit' in vision API errors.
acceptanceCriteria: UI shows distinct banners for each error type
stories.notes: Completed 2026-05-18. Updated vision rank route and event page. Commit: 641eeb9.

stories.title: Batch ranking for all media with progress UI
stories.description: Analyze all assets (not just 3) with real-time progress updates. Support videos via frame extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: Batch endpoint processes all assets in batches of 3
stories.notes: Completed 2026-05-18. Created batch ranking route, updated event page with progress UI. Commit: 36b983c.

stories.title: Variable-density frame extraction for video ranking
stories.description: Core zones get 2x more frames than edge zones. Edge frames weighted 0.7x, core frames 1.0x.
acceptanceCriteria: Temporal weighting applied in score calculation
stories.notes: Completed 2026-05-18. Rewrote batch route variable-density logic. Commit: 69dbbfd.

stories.title: Venice AI STT integration for audio-weighted scoring
stories.description: Extract audio from videos, transcribe via Venice AI Whisper, score based on keywords + speech density.
acceptanceCriteria: Audio extracted via ffmpeg to 16kHz mono WAV
STT via Venice API with openai/whisper-large-v3
Audio score blended into final score (30% weight)
stories.notes: Completed 2026-05-18. Created audio-analysis.ts, integrated into batch route, updated UI badges. Commit: a847f97.

stories.title: Video segmentation engine — scene detection + multi-segment extraction
stories.description: ffmpeg scene detection, dense per-scene frame sampling, audio-to-scene mapping, multi-segment extraction with variable durations.
acceptanceCriteria: ffmpeg scene detection produces natural cut points
Frames sampled densely within each scene
Audio segments mapped to scenes by timestamp overlap
stories.notes: Completed 2026-05-19. Created video-segmentation.ts with full pipeline. Commit: 1546173.

stories.title: Wire segmentation engine into batch ranking API
stories.description: Replace current frame extraction in batch route with full scene-aware segmentation pipeline. Store per-asset frame scores for composition reuse.
acceptanceCriteria: Batch route calls segmentVideo() instead of uniform frame extraction
Frame scores stored in response for composition reuse
Audio analysis runs in parallel with frame extraction
Backward compatibility maintained for image assets
stories.notes: Completed 2026-05-19. Replaced uniform frame extraction with scene-aware pipeline: detectScenes(), per-scene frame sampling, audio-to-scene mapping, multi-segment extraction. Frontend shows segment cards with type badges. Commit: 4accec3.

stories.title: Update composition API for smart trimming
stories.description: Composition script includes startTime/endTime per clip. ffmpeg commands use -ss and -t for precise extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: Composition script schema includes trimStart and trimDuration per clip
Fallback to full clip if trim data unavailable
stories.notes: Depends on GIS-007. Need ProductionSegment data threaded from ranking to composition.

stories.title: UI for multi-segment video display
stories.description: Ranking panel shows multiple candidate segments per video with type badges, timestamps, and score breakdowns.
acceptanceCriteria: Video cards show multiple segment candidates
stories.notes: Depends on GIS-007. Need batch route to return segment data first.

stories.title: Database schema for segment metadata persistence
stories.description: Store per-asset frame scores and segment metadata so composition can reuse ranking data without re-analyzing.
acceptanceCriteria: New table: VideoSegment with assetId, startTime, endTime, score, type
New table: FrameScore with assetId, timestamp, score, sceneIndex
Ranking API persists segments after analysis
stories.notes: Optional optimization. Can start with in-memory passing from ranking to composition via API response.
